DbtCloudSpec.description: dbt Cloud configuration for pre-sync running-job checks.

credentialsFile.description: Path to the dbt Cloud credentials file. Defaults to `~/.dbt/dbt_cloud.yml`.

DbtProfile.description: Reference to a profile defined in `~/.dbt/profiles.yml`.

target.description: If omitted, the default target in profiles.yml is used.

description: Spec for `kind: Connection`. Holds external data connection info referenced by Assets.

dbtCloud.description: Optional dbt Cloud configuration for running-job checks before sync.

dbtProfile.description: Required in MVP because profiles.yml is the only supported connection resolution mechanism. SQL-based conditions (Freshness, SQL) rely on it to resolve the adapter config. When direct connection configuration (host/port/credentials etc.) is added, this should become `Option<DbtProfile>` alongside alternative connection variants.

title: ConnectionSpec
